title: Claude AI Chatbot Cheat Sheet
description: Quick reference for using Claude AI Chatbot effectively in everyday tasks.

commands.command: Summarise this text
commands.description: Provides a concise summary of the provided text.
commands.scenario: When you have a long article and need a quick overview.

commands.command: Rewrite this in simpler language
commands.description: Rewrites text to be more understandable.
commands.scenario: When an email or document is too complex.

commands.command: Generate ideas for a blog post about AI
commands.description: Provides a list of creative ideas for a blog post.
commands.scenario: When brainstorming topics for content creation.

commands.command: Translate this text to Spanish
commands.description: Translates the given text into Spanish.
commands.scenario: When you need to communicate with Spanish speakers.

commands.command: Explain this concept like I'm five
commands.description: Simplifies a complex concept for easy understanding.
commands.scenario: When learning or teaching difficult topics.

commands.command: Create a to-do list for my project
commands.description: Generates a structured to-do list based on project details.
commands.scenario: When organizing tasks for a new project.

commands.command: Summarise this in 3 bullet points
commands.description: Condenses information into three key points.
commands.scenario: When you need quick highlights from a document.

commands.command: Draft a professional email to a client
commands.description: Creates a formal email draft for client communication.
commands.scenario: When you need to send a business email.

commands.command: List the pros and cons of remote work
commands.description: Provides advantages and disadvantages of remote work.

commands.command: Convert this list into a paragraph
commands.description: Transforms a list format into a paragraph.
commands.scenario: When needing to reformat notes into prose.

commands.command: Find recent studies on climate change
commands.description: Fetches recent research studies on climate change.
commands.scenario: When conducting research on climate topics.

commands.command: Generate a creative story starter
commands.description: Provides an opening line or idea for a story.
commands.scenario: When looking for inspiration to write fiction.

commands.command: Check this text for grammar errors
commands.description: Identifies and suggests corrections for grammatical mistakes.
commands.scenario: When proofreading a document for errors.

commands.command: Summarise this meeting transcript
commands.description: Condenses a meeting transcript into key points.
commands.scenario: When needing a quick recap of a meeting.

commands.command: Provide a step-by-step guide to bake a cake
commands.description: Offers detailed instructions for baking a cake.
commands.scenario: When you want to try a new recipe.

commands.command: Analyze the tone of this text
commands.description: Ask Claude to identify the emotional undertone (e.g., aggressive, empathetic, formal) of a message before you reply.

commands.command: Extract action items from this text
commands.description: Paste a messy email or notes and ask Claude to pull out only the specific tasks and deadlines mentioned.

commands.command: Create a table comparing [X] and [Y]
commands.description: Ask Claude to organize complex information into a structured table format for easier comparison.

commands.command: Roleplay as a [Job Title]
commands.description: Tell Claude to act as a specific professional (e.g., a career coach or a marketing expert) to get specialized advice.

commands.command: Reverse outline this document
commands.description: Ask Claude to create an outline based on a finished piece of writing to see if the logical flow makes sense.
